scripts.build: bun scripts/sync-assets.mjs && bun run build:deps && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build:deps: bun run --filter @webstir-io/module-contract build && bun run --filter @webstir-io/testing-contract build && bun run --filter @webstir-io/webstir-frontend build && bun run --filter @webstir-io/webstir-backend build && bun run --filter @webstir-io/webstir-testing build
scripts.test:required: bun run build && bun scripts/run-tests.mjs required
scripts.test:with-watch-browser: bun run build && bun scripts/run-tests.mjs with-watch-browser
scripts.test:browser:publish: bun run build && bun scripts/run-tests.mjs publish-browser
scripts.test:browser:watch: bun run build && bun scripts/run-tests.mjs watch-browser
